LightningComponentBundle.description: A file upload component with view/upload mode toggle and file actions.

property.name: contentDocumentLinkId
property.label: Content Document Link ID
property.description: ID of the existing ContentDocumentLink, if any.

property.name: name
property.label: Name Override
property.description: Optional display name to override the file name.

property.name: disabled
property.label: Disabled
property.description: Disable remove and upload new version actions.

property.name: label
property.label: Upload Label
property.description: Label shown above the file uploader.
